data.title: Israel Cancer Research Fund and The Mark Foundation partner to fund lung cancer project at Weizmann Institute of Science, focusing on EGFR-positive lung cancer.
data.description: A new research initiative is set to investigate antibody treatments specifically targeting EGFR-positive lung cancer, known for its aggressiveness and resistance to traditional treatments. The collaboration between the Israel Cancer Research Fund (ICRF) and The Mark Foundation for Cancer Research (MFCR) will focus on developing innovative approaches to combat this challenging form of the disease. The project, based in New York, was launched on September 25, 2025, aiming to pave the way for improved treatment options for patients battling EGFR-positive lung cancer.

data.title: Blackbaud releases AI updates and integrations in Impact Edge CSR reporting tool for purpose-driven companies. #BLKB #AI #CSR.
data.description: Blackbaud (NASDAQ: BLKB), a pioneer in AI technology for social impact, recently disclosed significant enhancements to their CSR reporting system on September 25, 2025, in Charleston, S.C. These updates aim to simplify reporting while also providing deeper insights through collaborations with True Impact and Candid. The improvements promise to streamline the reporting process and facilitate data integration, enabling users to unlock valuable information for their CSR activities.

data.title: Railinc and Duke University partner to innovate for freight rail efficiency, aiming to enhance safety & workforce readiness.
data.description: In a collaborative effort, Railinc and Duke University are partnering to address current rail industry challenges by leveraging student innovation. This initiative aims to develop tools that enhance safety, bolster workforce readiness, and ensure the efficient transportation of goods throughout American communities. The partnership was announced on September 25, 2025, in Cary, North Carolina.

data.title: Danny DeVito to host NJ Hall of Fame induction ceremony. Bongiovi, Thorp, and Jackson to be inducted. 17th year.
data.description: JBJ Soul Kitchen founder Dorothea Bongiovi, educator Drury Thorp, and physicist Dr. Shirley Ann Jackson are set to be inducted in East Rutherford, NJ on September 25, 2025. Hosted by Danny DeVito, the 17th Annual New Jersey event will honor these individuals for their exceptional contributions.

data.title: Zircon celebrates 50 years with user-friendly tools for emergency preparedness during National Preparedness Month.
data.description: Celebrating five decades of American innovation, Zircon is commemorating National Preparedness Month by offering its award-winning user-friendly tools to enhance safety at home and workspaces. Based in CAMPBELL, Calif., the initiative coincides with September 25, 2025. This serves as a valuable opportunity to remind individuals about the significance of being prepared for emergencies, with a special focus on mitigating potential dangers. Zircon's tools are designed to assist in creating a safer environment and are especially relevant in the current climate where disaster risks are high.

data.title: EV and hybrid sales are surging as federal tax credit deadline nears, car sales steady, demand rising.
data.description: Car sales have held steady this summer, with a notable increase in demand for electric vehicles (EVs) and hybrids. The surge in interest for EVs and plug-in hybrids comes as the federal tax credit for new and used electric vehicles approaches expiration. Shoppers are eager to take advantage of this incentive before it ends. The automotive market has seen a significant push towards alternative fuel vehicles with sales figures reflecting this trend. This increase in demand for EVs and hybrids has led to a competitive market for these vehicles, emphasizing the urgency felt by buyers to make their purchases before the tax credit deadline.

data.title: Neutrinos wins Silver Globee Award for AI-driven innovation in insurance industry, accelerating AI adoption.
data.description: A company specializing in AI-powered intelligent automation for insurers, Neutrinos, was honored for its innovative platform and efforts in driving AI adoption within the insurance sector. The award was given at the Silver Globee Business conference held in New York and Singapore on September 25, 2025. This recognition highlights Neutrinos' significant contributions to advancing technology in the industry.

data.title: Dow Jones falls on surprise GDP and jobless claims; Nvidia and Tesla stocks slide.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to unexpected figures in GDP and jobless claims. Nvidia and Tesla stocks were adversely affected, with both companies experiencing a sell-off. The unexpected numbers caused concern among investors, leading to a drop in the overall performance of the market. This news highlights the impact that economic data can have on stock prices and investor confidence.

data.title: Klaviyo launches Marketing Agent & Customer Agent at K:BOS event, establishing as AI-first B2C CRM.
data.description: In Boston, at the K:BOS event, Klaviyo (NYSE: KVYO) introduced its Marketing Agent and officially launched its Customer Agent. These innovations solidify Klaviyo as the leading AI-focused B2C CRM, bringing together data, marketing, service, and analytics into a singular platform to empower consumer brands. The aim is to provide a competitive edge within the industry. These agents form the core of Klaviyo's ambition to be the premiere autonomous B2C CRM tailored for the AI-driven age. Leveraging Klaviyo's data platform (KDP), the AI-powered Klaviyo agents...

data.title: Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. reports profit of over USD 0.57 million in July-August 2025. Strong turnaround in operations.
data.description: In ZIBO, China, as of September 25, 2025, Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. ("Sunrise"), trading on NASDAQ under EPOW, revealed notable progress. The company, a prominent player in graphite anode materials, disclosed a significant shift towards profitability in July and August 2025. Across these two months, Sunrise recorded a total net profit surpassing USD 0.57 million.

data.title: Coherent unveils next-gen 2D VCSEL and photodiode arrays to advance AI-driven optical interconnects.
data.description: A significant advancement has been made in short-reach optical interconnect technology with the successful unveiling of cutting-edge 2D VCSEL and photodiode arrays. This breakthrough marks a major step forward in the field, promising faster and more efficient data transmission. The newly developed technology showcases remarkable potential in enhancing connectivity, with impressive capabilities to revolutionize communication systems. This development is anticipated to significantly impact various sectors, offering improved performance and reliability.

data.title: SharpLink, a major ETH holder, to tokenized SBET stock on Superstate platform. SEC notified of the plan.
data.description: A major ETH holder, SharpLink, has informed the SEC about its intention to tokenize its common stock on the Open Bell tokenization platform by Superstate, a significant move in the financial sector. SharpLink is known for holding a substantial amount of ETH, highlighting the growing trend of tokenizing assets in the market. This decision showcases the increasing interest in digital asset management, with SharpLink looking to tokenize its common stock amidst this rising trend. The move indicates a shift towards digitalization in the financial industry, with SharpLink making a noteworthy step by choosing Superstate’s platform for this tokenization. This development reflects the changing dynamics of asset management and the potential for further growth in tokenization.

data.title: Ethereum drops below $4,000, causing a whale trader to lose $36 million. Ethereum: $3,988.08, $48.5B market cap.
data.description: The price of Ethereum (ETH) has fallen below $4,000, resulting in significant losses for a major trader and sparking concerns about further decline. Currently, Ethereum is priced at $3,988.08 with a market capitalization of $481.5 billion, showing a 7-day trend decrease of 12.9%. In comparison, Bitcoin (BTC) is valued at $111,359.45 with a market cap of $2.2 trillion, experiencing a 5% decrease. XRP is priced at $2.82 with a market cap of $168.9 billion, down by 9.5% in the last 7 days. Trader CrediBULL Crypto notes that a 30% drop from all-time highs is not unusual, referring to Bitcoin's corrections of 20-40% during the 2017 bull run. He emphasizes the importance of structural support levels over the drop's magnitude. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lamps Plus boosts data resilience using Veeam, cutting risk and costs by 85%. Major savings for the retailer.
data.description: In Seattle, Veeam Software has provided comprehensive protection, strong defense against ransomware, and significant cost reductions for a prominent retailer, Lamps Plus. The retailer stands to benefit from Veeam's extensive coverage and enhanced security measures, as well as substantial financial savings.
Reports in israel: The targets attacked in Sana'a: the Houthi General Staff's control headquarters and military camps with weapons.

data.title: Leasing industry expert Mitch Fadel joins DriveItAway Holdings as advisor - former CEO of Rent-A-Center.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. (OTC: DWAY), a prominent player in digital mobility and flexible vehicle lease-to-own services, revealed the appointment of Mitch Fadel to its Board of Advisors. Fadel, previously serving as the CEO of Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) and Rent-A-Center, now brings his expertise to DriveItAway. This move signifies a strategic development for the company as it continues to strengthen its advisory team.

data.title: Johnson Pump Marine sponsors "York County High School Anglers" youth fishing team, placing third out of 27 teams in South Carolina.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on September 25, 2025, Johnson Pump Marine, a division of SPX FLOW, announced their sponsorship of the "York County High School Anglers" youth fishing team from South Carolina. Out of 27 competing teams, this emerging fishing team secured a commendable third-place finish. They achieved victories in the Clarks Hill and Lake Keowee fishing competitions.
